user.title: Add a Return and Earn Location
user.description: Choose how to find the location you want to monitor.

pick_near_home.title: Select a Location
pick_near_home.description: Showing the nearest locations to your Home Assistant home address.

address.title: Search by Address
address.description: Enter a suburb, address or landmark in NSW. If the address is not found, all NSW locations will be shown alphabetically.

pick_near_address.title: Select a Location
pick_near_address.description: Showing the nearest locations to the address you entered.

manual_uuid.title: Enter Location UUID
manual_uuid.description: Find the UUID by visiting returnandearn.org.au/map, clicking a location pin, and copying the UUID from the network request URL (the string after /details/).

poll_interval.title: Poll Interval
poll_interval.description: How often to check the status of this location.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the TOMRA API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.empty_address: Please enter an address or suburb.

init.title: Reconfigure Location
init.description: Change the monitored location or adjust the poll interval.
